overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit plazas, exterior staircases, and commercial streets with heavy atmospheric effects and ray-traced reflections. The footage is from a video game engine with cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked urban plaza with central advertising pillar

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward a building with prominent pink neon lights

entered.detail: tall rectangular structure with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements
rain-soaked paved ground reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
small manicured trees in planters scattered across the plaza
towering futuristic buildings with glowing windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open rain-soaked plaza surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The wet pavement reflects vibrant pink and cyan neon lights. Sparse pedestrians are visible in the distance as the camera approaches a building with exterior stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior staircase of neon-lit commercial building

events.description: begins ascending the exterior staircase of the pink neon building
moving closer to intense pink neon vertical lighting on the building facade

agents.ego_description: climbing the exterior stairs of a building with prominent vertical pink neon strips

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs while holding a black umbrella
sitting on the steps against the railing

entered.detail: tall building with prominent vertical pink neon light strips and dark facade
wide stone staircase with metal railings leading up the building exterior
yellow automated vending booth at the base of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Ascending the exterior stairs of a building illuminated by intense pink neon vertical lights. Other pedestrians are descending the stairs, some with umbrellas against the rain. The camera moves from the open plaza into a more enclosed architectural space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered pedestrian walkway with commercial storefronts

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters covered elevated walkway
turns left along the elevated walkway passing under building overhangs

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway under building overhangs, passing the TENOU building

notable_agents.action: walking in same direction along the covered path wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: commercial building with prominent purple TENOU signage and neon trim
raised pedestrian path with wet reflective surface and overhead cover
architectural canopy extending over the walkway providing shelter from rain

segments.scene_description: Moving along an elevated pedestrian walkway partially covered by building overhangs. The TENOU building with its bright signage becomes prominent on the left. The environment transitions from exposed to sheltered as the camera moves under the architectural canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with hotel and advertising screens

events.description: exits covered walkway into open commercial street with AVANTE hotel visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the open commercial street toward the AVANTE hotel entrance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians conversing near the hotel entrance

entered.detail: large building with AVANTE HOTEL signage and illuminated entrance
wide pedestrian street lined with shops and digital advertising displays
large illuminated screens displaying advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open commercial street lined with digital billboards and the AVANTE hotel on the right. The area is less crowded than the stairway, with small groups of pedestrians near storefronts. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vast, rain-soaked plaza into the dense, sheltered corridors of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins by gliding across wet pavement reflecting vibrant pink and cyan lights beneath towering skyscrapers, moving steadily toward a building with exterior stairs. As the camera ascends these stairs, the open space gives way to a more enclosed architectural environment illuminated by intense vertical pink neon and populated by pedestrians with umbrellas. The scene then shifts onto an elevated pedestrian walkway, transitioning from exposed rain to the shelter of building overhangs as the bright signage of the TENOU building comes into view. Finally, the path opens back up into a commercial street lined with digital billboards and the AVANTE hotel, where the wet ground continues to mirror the surrounding glow of neon advertisements.
